issue_title: Make episode import easier to scan
issue_body:
**Phase:** Perfect — polishing the core experience

Polish the existing episode import page so the core setup flow keeps its premium, calm feel even when multiple speaker sources are present. Focus on making the speaker source area less tiny and form-heavy: clearer source cards, stronger role/name/social grouping, better spacing, and a more obvious path to review the draft episode without adding new capabilities.

## Acceptance (definition of done)
In the running UI, the episode import screen clearly separates episode details, recording source, and each speaker source; Host, Guest 1, and Guest 2 assignments remain visible and easy to edit; adding/removing speaker sources still works; social link fields are still present per speaker; the page remains responsive without cramped or overlapping fields; and `node scripts/run-tests.mjs` passes.

---
This is the current active step for this product. The maintainer will only merge a pull request that completes THIS step and demonstrably works. Open a PR that closes this issue.

_Why this step now: The product already covers the full vision breadth, and the core flow works end to end. The maintainer assessment calls the UI good but identifies the import page, especially speaker sources, as the main remaining rough edge in the central creator journey, so the right next step is core experience polish rather than another expansion._
